update_description:
⚡ Instant Playback & Video Player Fixes

* Instant Music Playback: Songs now play instantly with zero delay when you tap them 🎵⚡
* Look-Ahead Pre-buffering: Background caching prepares upcoming songs for smooth, gapless playback ⏩🎧
* Fast First Song Launch: Top search results, album tracks, and playlist songs start playing immediately 🚀▶️
* Video Progress Bar Fix: Progress bar and seek time are now always visible during video playback in Echo Player 📺⏳
* Clean Video Screen: Removed top overlay bars (settings icon) for an uninterrupted video viewing experience 🎬✨
* General stability improvements and faster performance ⚡🛠️
